mapper.sql: p.id, p.author_id, p.title, p.content, p.summary, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at, u.nickname as author_name
mapper.select: select from posts p join users u on u.id = p.author_id where p.status = 1 order by p.created_at desc
select from posts p join users u on u.id = p.author_id where p.id = #{id} and p.status = 1
select from posts p join users u on u.id = p.author_id where p.id = #{id}
select from posts p join users u on u.id = p.author_id where p.author_id = #{authorId} order by p.created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into posts (author_id, title, content, summary, status) values (#{authorId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{status})
mapper.delete: delete from posts where id = #{id} and author_id = #{authorId}
mapper.select: select t.name from tags t join post_tags pt on pt.tag_id = t.id where pt.post_id = #{postId} order by pt.created_at asc
mapper.insert: insert ignore into post_tags (post_id, tag_id) select #{postId}, id from tags where name = #{tagName}
